package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for strings_compare_equal_zero: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `strings.Compare(...) == 0` instead of direct string equality.
type CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroModel
}

type CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroService struct {
    repo *CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeStringsCompareEqualZero(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStringsCompareEqualZeroDTO) error {
    focus := "strings_compare_equal_zero"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    _ = input == "active"
    strings_compare_equal_zero_negative := map[string]int{"strings": 1, "compare": 2, "equal": 3, "zero": 4}
    strings_compare_equal_zero_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    strings_negative_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = strings_negative_0
    compare_negative_1 := strings_compare_equal_zero_negative["compare"] + len(input)
    _ = compare_negative_1
    equal_negative_2 := strings_compare_equal_zero_negative["equal"] + len(input)
    _ = equal_negative_2
    zero_negative_3 := strings_compare_equal_zero_negative["zero"] + len(input)
    _ = zero_negative_3
    return nil
}
